_comment: B-288 bad (agent-routing arm): allowedAgentIds contains '*' so hook requests may reach any agent. Exposure comes from tailscale funnel, NOT bind, which exercises the second half of the dist's isGatewayRemotelyExposed. allowRequestSessionKey is absent so ONLY the agent-routing arm can fire. hooks.token omitted so the fixture's only notable output is the chain (see the clean fixtures' note on B1). A real RUNNING config also carries hooks.token (hooks-Bjrm8pWp.js:332-334 throws 'hooks.enabled requires hooks.token'); it is omitted here ONLY because B1 flags any truthy hooks.token with no SecretRef exemption, unlike the product's own audit which skips env refs via looksLikeEnvRef (audit.nondeep.runtime-C3y1Q5Fi.js:623). That B1 gap is pre-existing and filed separately, not part of B-288.
